products.title: DREAM JELLY Coconut Lip Balm
products.description: A moisturizing vegan lip balm that instantly plumps lips with a glossy finish and hint of coconut flavor.

products.title: EMERALD Universal Balm
products.description: Nourish and soothe with this multi-use balm, infused with a blend of jojoba, meadowfoam seed, and borage oils, plus adaptogenic ashwagandha. Designed to be used all over the body to intensely moisturize and relieve dryness in areas that need extra care.

products.title: EMERALD Adaptogen Cleansing Milk Body Wash
products.description: Make forest bathing a daily ritual with this body wash designed to ground the senses and help soothe skin. Made with meadowfoam seed oil, plus adaptogenic ashwagandha and shiitake mushroom, this milky cleanser lathers into a soft foam to leave skin feeling gently cleansed and deeply comforted.

products.title: COCO ROSE Deodorant
products.description: Help keep underarms smooth and defend against odor with a nourishing, aluminum-free deodorant. Squalane and coconut oil moisturize and soften skin while plant-powered ingredients work together to help absorb sweat and neutralize odors, accompanied by the delicate scent of coconut and rose.

products.title: COCO ROSE Coconut + Peptide Lip Balm-to-Oil
products.description: This solid balm-to-oil formula helps to soften and moisturize lips, with plant-based waxes and a plant-based peptide designed to lock in moisture and leave lips feeling replenished.

products.title: COCO ROSE Tremella + Magnesium Bath Soak
products.description: Turn your bath into an indulgent ritual. Himalayan pink salts create the base for a skin-softening and calming soak, with two forms of magnesium, a mineral known to relax and replenish the body and aid in sleep, plus hyaluronic acid and tremella mushroom for infusing hydration.

products.title: COCO ROSE Coconut + Tremella Milky Body Mist
products.description: Soften skin and replenish moisture with a lightweight milky body mist infused with squalane, coconut oil, and coconut water. This formula absorbs instantly and is designed for use on damp skin post shower or dry skin anytime.

products.title: BAKUCHIOL Retinol Alternative Hand Cream
products.description: This restorative self-care ritual helps to moisturize and care for hands with bakuchiol, an effective retinol alternative. Nourishing plant-based butters, and vitamin E help to revive dry skin leaving hands feeling smooth, soft, and cocooned with moisture.

products.title: BAKUCHIOL Retinol Alternative Body Serum
products.description: This rejuvenating daily body treatment is powered by bakuchiol, an effective retinol-alternative, rosehip oil, and vitamin E. This serum infuses skin with moisture and helps soften and smooth skin. The soft scent of botanicals and green woods create a restorative self-care ritual.

products.title: AQUARIUS BHA + Blue Tansy Clarity Facial Cleanser
products.description: Help skin find balance with a deep, purifying clean. Made with willow bark BHA to gently exfoliate and blue tansy to cleanse excess oil, this gel-to-foam formula cleanses and removes impurities from pores. Designed for combination, oily, and acne-prone skin.

products.title: PHOENIX Rosehip + Sea Buckthorn Body Cream
products.description: Indulge your skin in moisture with a rich body cream infused with shea butter, rosehip and seabuckthorn oils to nourish and revitalize the appearance of skin. Rich in fatty acids and antioxidants, this formula leaves skin looking-healthy and moisturized.

products.title: NOVA Turmeric + Pineapple Body Polish
products.description: Boost skin’s glow with a body polish designed to help skin look more even-toned and smooth. A blend of sugars and pineapple enzymes exfoliate and smooth skin, along with antioxidant-rich turmeric to help reveal a healthy-looking glow. Coconut oil and shea butter provide rich moisture leaving skin soft and replenished.

products.title: NOVA Turmeric + Vitamin C Body Oil
products.description: Moisturize and glow with a vitamin C infused body oil that helps improve skin’s radiance. Formulated with jojoba and meadowfoam seed oils for lightweight and lasting moisture, helping to defend against free radicals, and brighten the appearance of skin.

products.title: LAPIS Blue Tansy Cleansing Gel Body Wash
products.description: Give your skin a refresh with a balancing body wash designed to cleanse without stripping, helping to balance excess oil. Pineapple enzymes gently exfoliate and clarify pores, while blue tansy soothes and supports skin’s microbiome.

products.title: LAPIS Blue Tansy + Magnesium Bath Soak
products.description: Turn your bath into the ultimate wellness sanctuary. This purifying soak is powered by blue clay, mineral-rich dead sea salts, and two forms of magnesium. The tranquil scent creates a soothing experience; ideal for relaxing sore muscles and balancing your state of mind.

products.title: LAPIS Blue Tansy + Squalane Balancing Body Oil
products.description: Balance your skin and state of mind. Nourishing meadowfoam oil and squalane meet the clarifying power of blue tansy in this lightweight, fast-absorbing body oil. Use post-shower or bath to replenish skin’s moisture while helping to refresh and clarify.

products.title: EMERALD Deodorant
products.description: Soothe underarm skin and defend against odor with a nourishing, aluminum-free deodorant. Centella asiatica and adaptogens help to soothe skin, while a plant-based tapioca starch helps absorb sweat and neutralize odors. Infused with the calming scent of hinoki and vetiver.

products.title: EMERALD Hemp Seed + Adaptogens Calming Facial Oil
products.description: Relieve and moisturize your skin with Emerald Calming Facial Oil. Hemp seed combines with vegan squalane and adaptogens for a dose of skin-calming moisture. This lightweight oil is non-comedogenic and made for all skin types.

products.title: COCO ROSE Coconut + Sugar Body Polish
products.description: This luxurious body scrub, formulated with a moisturizing blend of coconut oil, sugar, and Moroccan rose, leaves skin gently exfoliated and intensely hydrated. Shea butter nourishes, and pink clay provides a gentle exfoliation to reveal silky soft and dewy skin.

products.title: CLOUD MILK Coconut + Maca Firming Body Cream
products.description: Smooth and moisturize skin with a rich body cream infused with coconut milk, maca, and squalane to firm and soften the appearance of skin. Rich in amino acids, vitamins, and electrolytes, this formula leaves skin feeling luminous and hydrated.

products.title: CLOUD JELLY Tremella + Strawberry Plumping Hydration Face Serum
products.description: Hydrate and replenish skin’s moisture barrier with this lightweight serum that provides an all-day glow. Made with tremella mushroom, strawberry extract, and squalane, this formula plumps skin with moisture and locks in hydration for a soft, nourished complexion.

products.title: BLUE TANSY Resurfacing Clarity Face Mask
products.description: Balance and refresh skin with a gentle resurfacing mask made with papaya and pineapple enzymes, white willow bark, and blue tansy. This clarifying gel mask can be used as a weekly purifying ritual to gently exfoliate and cleanse pores.

products.title: BAKUCHIOL Dual-Retinol Alternative Face Serum
products.description: Smooth and firm the appearance of skin with this lightweight treatment designed to be used in your nightly restorative skincare ritual. This supercharged serum contains two forms of bakuchiol to mimic the effects of a traditional retinol, in a formula designed to be gentle on skin.

products.title: NOVA Turmeric + Niacinamide Bi-Phase Glow Facial Oil
products.description: Moisturize and glow with NOVA, a facial oil featuring bio-fermented niacinamide, turmeric, and squalane. This lightweight bi-phase formula is made with plant-based oils and a gentle yet potent active serum that combine to nourish the skin barrier, deliver instant radiance, and visibly brighten the complexion.

products.title: MOON DEW 1% Bakuchiol + Peptides Retinol Alternative Eye Cream
products.description: Smooth and tighten under eyes with MOON DEW, a firming eye cream designed to be used on the delicate skin around the entire eye area. This hydrating formula contains 1% bakuchiol and plant peptides to diminish the look of fine lines + wrinkles and deliver an instant tightening effect.

products.title: LAPIS Blue Tansy + Squalane Balancing Facial Oil
products.description: Balance moisture levels and clarify your complexion with LAPIS, a facial oil designed for all skin types. Made with blue tansy, jojoba, and squalane oil to moisturize and balance the skin barrier, this oil is non-comedogenic and made for all skin types – including oily or acne-prone skin.

products.title: GREEN MAGIC Centella + Ceramides Soothing Face Serum
products.description: Help soothe and relieve stressed skin with centella, ceramides, and marine algae. This lightweight serum reduces the appearance of redness and helps support skin’s natural barrier for an overall even complexion. Winner of Cosmopolitan's 2025 Holy Grail Beauty Award for Best Calming/Soothing Serum. Winner of GQ's Grooming Awards 2024 for Best Serum.

products.title: COCO MILK Hydrating Milk Bath Soak
products.description: Turn your bath into an instant vacation. This hydrating soak contains coconut milk, coconut pulp, and vanilla to help nourish and soften skin with a creamy coconut scent.

products.title: TREMELLA Silky Hydration Gel Face Cream
products.description: Hydrate weightlessly with TREMELLA, a lightweight gel cream formulated with tremella mushroom, vegan silk, and squalane. Designed to lock in moisture, smooth and prep skin for makeup, and support the skin barrier for healthy-looking, hydrated skin. Suitable for all skin types. *Packaging may vary

products.title: PINK CLOUD Rosewater + Tremella Jelly Facial Cleanser
products.description: Refresh and nourish skin with a hydrating cleanser formulated with rosewater, tremella mushroom, and squalane. This creamy gel cleanser works into a gentle lather to lift away makeup, sunscreen, and impurities, leaving skin clean and replenished in one simple step.

products.title: PHOENIX Rosehip + Sea Buckthorn Deep Renewal Facial Oil
products.description: Nourish and renew your complexion with PHOENIX, an intensely moisturizing facial oil that is clinically shown to support long-lasting moisture retention. PHOENIX is made with rosehip oil, which is naturally high in vitamin C and known to improve skin texture and tone. This oil is non-comedogenic and ideal for normal to dry skin types.

products.title: NOVA 15% Vitamin C + Turmeric Brightening Face Serum
products.description: Brighten and even your complexion with NOVA, a daily brightening serum powered by vitamin C and golden turmeric. This creamy formula visibly evens skin’s tone and fades dark spots, leaving skin looking radiant, smooth, and more luminous over time.

products.title: COCO ROSE Tremella Cleansing Oil Body Wash
products.description: Turn your shower into a self-care ritual with an oil-to foam body wash that moisturizes as it cleanses with rose and coconut oils plus tremella mushroom to leave skin feeling nourished after bathing. This gentle cleansing ritual is formulated for daily use, and doubles as a shaving companion.

products.title: Skin in the Clouds Plumping Hydration Set
products.description: Give skin a boost of moisture with our Skin in the Clouds Plumping Hydration Set, a complete three-step ritual crafted to cleanse, quench, and nourish dry to neutral skin. *Packaging may vary.

products.title: THE GEM SET
LITTLE LUXURIES SET
MILKY WAY 10% AHA + Oat Soothing Exfoliating Serum
products.description: A first of its kind, plant-powered exfoliating acid treatment that effectively smooths uneven skin texture and delivers an instant glow with 10% AHA + 3% PHA. Oat, Ceramides + Hyaluronic acid deeply hydrate the skin and protect the moisture barrier so you get all of the glow with zero irritation.

products.title: MOON FRUIT 1% Bakuchiol + Peptides Retinol Alternative Serum
products.description: Meet the 100% plant-based retinol-alternative serum that promotes surface cell renewal to target the multiple signs of aging (smooths the look of fine lines and wrinkles, visibly firms and evens skin tone and texture). Gentle and clinically shown to be as effective as a retinol without the irritation, flaking or redness.

products.title: Mask Applicator Brush
products.description: Apply your mask evenly + hygienically with a reusable applicator brush - custom made with ultra-soft, vegan + cruelty-free Taklon bristles.

products.title: AQUARIUS Pore Purifying Clarity Cream
ORCHID Facial Oil Mini
products.description: Concentrated Moisture. Oils are concentrated, and effective moisturizers. Our oils sink in deeply to moisturize and nourish with antioxidants and vitamins, which work to hydrate dry skin and give it a radiant glow.

products.title: Jade De-Puffing Face Roller - FINAL SALE
products.description: The Jade De-Puffing Face Roller is an incredible tool for inner + outer beauty. Facial rolling is relaxing and de-stressing. It has been a beauty ritual since ancient times in China, dating all the way back to the 7th century.
